name: RudderStack
description: Customer data platform for event streaming and data routing. Monitor data sources.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your RudderStack dashboard at https://app.rudderstack.com
2. Go to Settings > Service Access Tokens
3. Generate a workspace-level Service Access Token
4. Enter the token below
